description: Self-hosted Personal DevOps Workspace Platform for Ubuntu Desktop
completedTasks: Create all documentation files under docs/
Add unit tests for config, utils, workspace, engine
Implement Template domain model and Registry (internal/template)
Seed templates/ with kubernetes, docker, jenkins, linux, terraform, ansible definitions
Wire Engine.CreateWorkspace to resolve Services from a Template
Add unit tests for template.Registry; update engine tests
Implement internal/storage.Open (SQLite, pure Go, no cgo)
Add SQLite index to workspace.Manager (name uniqueness, ordered List)
Update workspace.NewManager to accept *sql.DB and return error
Keep index in sync with workspace.json on Create/Delete, with rollback
Add modernc.org/sqlite dependency; go mod tidy
Add unit tests for internal/storage; update workspace/engine tests to use real SQLite
Define shared Runtime interface and Command/Result types (internal/runtime)
Implement Shell Runtime (internal/runtime/shell) backed by os/exec.CommandContext
Fix context-cancellation vs nonzero-exit-code bug found during testing
Implement k3d Runtime (internal/runtime/k3d) composed over runtime.Runtime
Constrain k3d Runtime Execute to the k3d binary only
Add unit tests for internal/runtime/k3d using a fake runtime.Runtime
Manually verify ListClusters JSON parsing against a real k3d cluster (one-off, not automated)
notes: cmd/devlab/main.go remains a minimal entrypoint; CLI wiring is not part of any completed sprint yet. Engine intentionally does not expose Start/Stop/Reset yet (see ADR-0007); that is Sprint 10. engine.New takes (*workspace.Manager, *template.Registry); CreateWorkspace takes (name, description, templateName) and resolves Services from the Template (see ADR-0008). Template Service entries are not yet validated against a service-type catalog (see ADR-0009) — internal/service does not exist until Sprint 7. workspace.NewManager now takes (rootDir string, db *sql.DB) and returns (*Manager, error); workspace.json remains the source of truth for full Workspace data, SQLite is only a name-uniqueness/ordering index (see ADR-0010, ADR-0011). internal/runtime.Runtime (Execute(ctx, Command) (*Result, error)) is the shared contract for Shell/Docker/k3d Runtimes (see ADR-0012); no command allow-list on Shell Runtime, injection prevented structurally via argv slices (see ADR-0013). k3d Runtime (internal/runtime/k3d) is composed over an injected runtime.Runtime and, unlike Shell Runtime, restricts Execute to the k3d binary only (see ADR-0014). Neither Runtime is wired into a Service yet — internal/service does not exist until Sprint 7. k3d and docker happen to be installed in this sandbox but automated tests do not depend on them (fake runtime.Runtime used instead).
